summary: Iteration 15 - TP/SL Locking, Signal Deletion, Trading Modes, TP Count, Trade Close Fix. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new features: Trading Mode selector (4 modes), TP Count selector (1/2/3 TPs), Delete signal functionality, Signal generation with new parameters.

backend: GET /api/signals/trading-modes returns 4 modes (scalping, day_trading, swing, position) SUCCESS
DELETE /api/signals/{fake_id} returns 404 for nonexistent signal SUCCESS
DELETE /api/signals requires authentication (401 without auth) SUCCESS
Signal generation with trading_mode=scalping works SUCCESS
Signal generation with num_tp_levels=1 works SUCCESS
Signal generation with num_tp_levels=2 works SUCCESS
Signals have required fields (signal_id, asset_id, direction, entry_price, take_profit_1, stop_loss, status) SUCCESS
GET /api/market/live returns crypto, forex, indian data SUCCESS
frontend: Signals page loads with all new UI elements SUCCESS
Trading Mode selector shows 4 modes (Scalp, Day, Swing, Position) SUCCESS
TP Count selector shows 3 options (1 TP, 2 TPs, 3 TPs) SUCCESS
Delete button visible on signal cards SUCCESS
Delete signal removes signal from list with toast notification SUCCESS
Signal generation with Forex + Scalping + 2 TPs works SUCCESS
Generated signal shows correct trading_mode badge SUCCESS
Generated signal shows correct TP levels (TP1, TP2 for 2 TPs) SUCCESS

trading_modes.verification: All 4 modes selectable in UI, backend returns all 4 modes

tp_count_selector.verification: All 3 options selectable, signals generated with correct num_tp_levels

signal_deletion.verification: Signal deleted via API and UI, toast notification shown

tp_sl_locking.function: check_signal_tp_sl() runs every 5 ticks in ticker loop
tp_sl_locking.verification: Backend function implemented, UI shows LOCKED/STOPPED OUT when applicable

trade_close_fix.verification: Endpoint first GETs position to determine long/short, then sends correct close body

timeframes_user_controlled.verification: 13 timeframe buttons visible, not auto-changed by trading mode

seed_data_creation: Generated test signals during testing (EUR/USD scalping, Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana signals)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified all new features: 1) Trading modes (scalping, day_trading, swing, position) - all 4 modes work in backend and frontend. 2) TP count selector (1, 2, 3 TPs) - signals generated with correct num_tp_levels. 3) Signal deletion - DELETE /api/signals/{signal_id} works, UI shows toast notification. 4) TP/SL locking - check_signal_tp_sl() function runs every 5 ticks, updates tp1_hit/tp2_hit/tp3_hit/sl_hit fields, changes status to stopped_out or all_tp_hit. 5) Trade close fix - endpoint first GETs position to determine long/short. 6) Timeframes remain user-controlled (not auto-changed by trading mode). 7) Auto-refresh every 10 seconds. All APIs are LIVE (no mocking).
